---
name: Task
about: Use for issue-driven worktree tasks
title: "TASK-###: <short summary>"
labels: ["type:task", "status:not-started"]
---

## Seq
- Add the next sequence number for this issue body.

## Depends on
- List any blocking `TASK-###` identifiers, or write `none`.

## Problem
- Describe the problem to solve.

## Scope
- Keep the change narrowly scoped to the requested issue.

## Test Plan
- List the smallest command(s) that prove the change works.

## Definition of Done
- The requested change is complete.
- Tests pass.
- No unrelated files are changed.
